svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="演进路线" id="luban-roadmap"> <mxGraphModel dx="-434" dy="-258" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="820" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="N_P0" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=middle;" value="P0 功能闭环
—
• 六库打通
• API 契约统一" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="420" x="200" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_P1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=middle;" value="P1 高可用（稳基）
—
• MySQL / Redis 主从
• 多实例 + 健康检查
• 基础监控与日志" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="124" width="420" x="200" y="184" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_P2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=middle;" value="P2 高并发（扛量）
—
• 读写分离
• 公开页缓存与限流 / 熔断" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="108" width="420" x="200" y="352" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_P3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=middle;" value="P3 体验与成本（优化）
—
• CDN / 缓存
• 异步任务
• 多运行时 / 多地域（可选）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="124" width="420" x="200" y="504" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_P4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=middle;" value="P4 平台化（演进）
—
• 多租户与配额
• 开放 API / Webhook
• 审计与版本 / 回滚" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="124" width="420" x="200" y="672" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_P0" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="先做出来" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_P1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="别宕机" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="60" y="226" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_P2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="扛得住流量" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="60" y="386" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_P3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="体验 / 省钱" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="60" y="546" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L_P4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="做成平台" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="60" y="714" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E01" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_P0" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_P1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E12" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_P1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_P2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E23" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_P2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_P3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E34" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_P3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_P4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LEGEND" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=middle;" value="图例：每阶段目标一句话（左侧灰底），右侧为该阶段关键工作项。阶段按顺序推进，前一阶段是后一阶段的前提。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="700" x="60" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 404px; height: 1px; padding-top: 50px; margin-left: 156px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:

—
• 六库打通
• API 契约统一

div.div:

—
• MySQL / Redis 主从
• 多实例 + 健康检查
• 基础监控与日志
